title: Feb 15 | ✅ 📌 🛠️ Career Coaching Hotline — Debug & Fix
summary: Comprehensive debug of the Career Coaching Hotline resume pipeline and webhook infrastructure. Found and fixed 5 bugs.

fixes.fix: Added phone_number column to schema + ALTER TABLE migration for existing DBs. Updated logCall() to extract call.customer.number from VAPI payload. Backfilled 2 existing records.

Removed output_format parameter from Zo API calls. Added robust JSON parsing with markdown code block handling. Affects all 4 LLM tools: assessCareerStage, analyzeResumeBullet, diagnoseSearchStrategy, scoreResumeSection.

fixes.issue: INSERT OR REPLACE is invalid DuckDB syntax
fixes.fix: Replaced with DELETE + INSERT pattern in logCall().

fixes.issue: Fragile raw_data LIKE queries for call history
fixes.fix: Replaced 4 instances of WHERE raw_data LIKE '%phone%' with WHERE phone_number = ? in getCallerCallHistory() and compactCallerHistoryAsync().
Cleaned 2 stale caller_lookup records (LLM-generated during test calls), 3 duplicate resume copies in storage.

verification: Both services healthy, 11 tools loaded, DB schema updated with phone_number column
